summary: TWO_COLUMN: ComplexPlane left with always_redraw partial trace of ζ_N(1/2+it) (N=80) and head dot driven by ValueTracker T sweeping 0.1→40; precomputed values. Right column has live t, |ζ|, arg(ζ), plus a mini |ζ_N| vs t plot with the first nontrivial zero t≈14.135 marked, plus the RH statement.
